prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document pertains specifically to the Environment Agency's procedures in England regarding water abstraction applications. It does not apply to Scotland, which has its own regulatory framework for water management and abstraction under the Scottish Environment Protection Agency.
